name: StraightDimensionSetHandler
summary: The StraightDimensionSetHandler class contains operations for creating and modifying straight dimension sets.

constructors.name: StraightDimensionSetHandler
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the StraightDimensionSetHandler class

methods.name: CreateDimensionSet(ViewBase, PointList, Vector, Double)
methods.signature: public StraightDimensionSet CreateDimensionSet(ViewBase View, PointList DimensionPoints, Vector UpDirection, double Distance)
methods.summary: Creates straight dimensions and combines them to one straight dimension set. Returns null if fails.

params.name: View
params.doc: The view to be used.

params.name: DimensionPoints
params.doc: The dimension points to be used.

params.name: UpDirection
params.doc: The direction from the dimension points to the dimension line.

params.name: Distance
params.doc: The distance in paper millimeters taken from the first dimension point to the dimension line.

returns.doc: The created straight dimension set or null if fails.

methods.name: CreateDimensionSet(ViewBase, PointList, Vector, Double, StraightDimensionSet.StraightDimensionSetAttributes)
methods.signature: public StraightDimensionSet CreateDimensionSet(ViewBase View, PointList DimensionPoints, Vector UpDirection, double Distance, StraightDimensionSet.StraightDimensionSetAttributes Attributes)
methods.summary: Creates straight dimensions and combines them to one straight dimension set. Returns null if fails.

params.name: View
params.doc: The view to be used.

params.name: DimensionPoints
params.doc: The dimension points to be used.

params.name: UpDirection
params.doc: The direction from the dimension points to the dimension line.

params.name: Distance
params.doc: The distance in paper millimeters taken from the first dimension point to the dimension line.

params.name: Attributes
params.doc: The attributes to be used.

returns.doc: The created straight dimension set or null if fails.

methods.name: CreateDimensionSet(ViewBase, PointList, Vector, Double, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public StraightDimensionSet CreateDimensionSet(ViewBase View, PointList DimensionPoints, Vector UpDirection, double Distance, double LeftTagLineOffset, double RightTagLineOffset)
methods.summary: Creates straight dimensions and combines them to one straight dimension set. Returns null if fails.

params.name: View
params.doc: The view to be used.

params.name: DimensionPoints
params.doc: The dimension points to be used.

params.name: UpDirection
params.doc: The direction from the dimension points to the dimension line.

params.name: Distance
params.doc: The distance in paper millimeters taken from the first dimension point to the dimension line.

params.name: LeftTagLineOffset
params.doc: The left tag line offset measured in paper millimeters.

params.name: RightTagLineOffset
params.doc: The right tag line offset measured in paper millimeters.

returns.doc: The created straight dimension set or null if fails.

methods.signature: public StraightDimensionSet CreateDimensionSet(ViewBase View, PointList DimensionPoints, Vector UpDirection, double Distance, double LeftTagLineOffset, double RightTagLineOffset, StraightDimensionSet.StraightDimensionSetAttributes Attributes)
methods.summary: Creates straight dimensions and combines them to one straight dimension set. Returns null if fails.
